use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR ADMINISTERING ESTRADIOL COMPRISING A MONOLITHIC TRANSDERMAL DRUG DELIVERY SYSTEM CONSISTING OF (I) A BACKING LAYER AND (II) A SINGLE ADHESIVE POLYMER MATRIX LAYER AS CLAIMED IN US PATENT NO. 9730900
